className: w-full h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-12

src: var a = ctx.animate({ from:{bg:'#ef4444'}, to:{bg:'#3b82f6'}, duration:60, easing:'ease-in-out', repeat:-1, yoyo:true }); ctx.getNode('swatch').bg(a.bg); var b = ctx.animate({ from:{textColor:'#ffffff'}, to:{textColor:'#fbbf24'}, duration:60, easing:'ease-in-out', repeat:-1, yoyo:true }); ctx.getNode('label').textColor(b.textColor);
